name: INTERNATIONAL STAR INC
business: International Star Inc. is engaged in the acquisition and exploration of precious and base metals mineral properties in Arizona, with no reserves and no income from mineral production.

exposures.sentence: Currently, we are engaged in the acquisition and exploration of precious and base metals mineral properties.

catalysts.event: Plan to conduct further phases of drilling and exploration on Black Mountains properties
catalysts.sentence: During 2011, subject to available funding, the Company plans to conduct further phases of drilling and other exploration work to determine whether our Black Mountains properties contain commercially extractable reserves.
